summary: Iteration 3 frontend-only verification of Aurrum Intelligence landing page. All 3 bug fixes (A: navbar logo, B: hero-meta bar full-width, C: Fibonacci pill chips) PASSED. Regression checks also PASSED — all 8 Elliott wave labels present, landing/headline visible, no console errors.

BUG_C_fibonacci_labels.note: 61.8% has larger height (16.4 vs 12.1) — golden level weight 700 rendering correctly. Pill chips (ivory rects + blue text) clearly visible on right side of chart in screenshot.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration-3 bug fixes verified on 1920x1080 viewport. Nav logo h-20 renders at 80px, hero-meta-left spans 40→1880 with 4 evenly distributed items via justify-between, Fibonacci labels render as visible pill chips at x≈1540. No regressions.
